testcase.name: test_get_podcast_metadata
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast_metadata(): podcast_id = "kongerekka"
> metadata = psapi.get_podcast_metadata(podcast_id)
common/test_psapi.py:8: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
podcast_id = 'kongerekka', format = 'json'
def get_podcast_metadata(podcast_id, format = "json"): logging.debug(f"Fetching metadata for podcast {podcast_id}...")
url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}" r = treq.get(url, headers=headers)
> if r.status_code != 200: E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
common/psapi.py:92: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_get_podcast_episodes
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast_episodes(): podcast_id = "berrum_beyer_snakker_om_greier"
> episodes = psapi.get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id)
common/test_psapi.py:18: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
podcast_id = 'berrum_beyer_snakker_om_greier', season = None, format = 'json'
def get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id, season = None, format = "json"): logging.info(f"Fetching episodes for podcast {podcast_id} ({season})...")
url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}/episodes?page=1&pageSize=10&sort=desc" if season: url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}/seasons/{season}?page=1&pageSize=10&sort=desc"
r = treq.get(url, headers=headers) > if r.status_code != 200: E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
common/psapi.py:59: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_get_all_podcast_episodes
testcase.failure:
def test_get_all_podcast_episodes(): podcast_id = "kongerekka"
> episodes = psapi.get_all_podcast_episodes(podcast_id)
common/test_psapi.py:32: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
podcast_id = 'kongerekka', season = None
def get_all_podcast_episodes(podcast_id, season = None): url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}/episodes?page=1&pageSize=30&sort=asc"
if season: url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}/seasons/{season}?page=1&pageSize=30&sort=asc"
episodes = [] while True: r = treq.get(url, headers=headers) > if r.status_code != 200: E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
common/psapi.py:33: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_get_podcast_episodes_by_season
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast_episodes_by_season(): podcast_id = "kongerekka" season_id = "2020"
> episodes = psapi.get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id, season_id)
common/test_psapi.py:79: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
podcast_id = 'kongerekka', season = '2020', format = 'json'
def get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id, season = None, format = "json"): logging.info(f"Fetching episodes for podcast {podcast_id} ({season})...")
url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}/episodes?page=1&pageSize=10&sort=desc" if season: url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}/seasons/{season}?page=1&pageSize=10&sort=desc"
r = treq.get(url, headers=headers) > if r.status_code != 200: E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
common/psapi.py:59: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_get_all_podcasts
test_update_podcasts_config
test_get_podcast
testcase.failure:
def test_get_podcast(): feeds_dir = "tests/rss" os.makedirs(feeds_dir, exist_ok=True)
podcast_id = "kongerekka" season_id = "2020"
> podcast = get_podcast(podcast_id, season_id, feeds_dir, 10)

url = f"{api_base_url}/radio/catalog/podcast/{podcast_id}" r = treq.get(url, headers=headers)
> if r.status_code != 200: E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
common/psapi.py:92: AttributeError
